behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: Failure is at a local module handoff boundary (diff parser -> review-input builder), not single-function logic. An in-process fixture with file patches and unchanged-file content can catch leakage of unchanged lines. Rejected System: behavior text is only about scoping review input, not real network/OS/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no requirement about model judgment quality or multi-agent decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real diff-to-prompt modules with a synthetic PR diff containing large unchanged sections; assert the constructed review payload includes only added/modified diff hunks and excludes untouched file bodies.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Real failure commonly appears only with the live PR provider’s diff-position semantics (path/side/line/commit mapping). Mocks often accept invalid coordinates that the real API rejects or remaps. Rejected Integration: behavior text explicitly targets correctness in PR diff view, which depends on real HTTP/API behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed coordinates from the automation and verify each appears on the intended changed line in the provider UI/API response.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on actual model judgment (detecting a semantic bug), which a stubbed response would hide. Rejected Workflow: behavior asks for one detection outcome, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence. Rejected System: real PR transport is secondary; core failure boundary is model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run the analyzer with a real model on a known-bug PR diff corpus; assert at least one finding matches the seeded defect class/location with tolerant matching criteria.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic state consistency across local components (inline-post result store -> summary assembler). In-process wiring catches ID mismatches, stale IDs, or cross-run contamination. Rejected System: no behavior text requiring real network effects beyond returning IDs. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: mapping check is independent of model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute comment-post and summary-build modules together with deterministic posted-comment responses (including run_id); assert each summary item references an inline comment ID emitted in that exact run.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode is loss during orchestration (collector -> transformer -> summary payload), which requires module interaction but not real OS/network/model behavior. Rejected System: drop can be reproduced with in-process fixtures. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: completeness check is deterministic once findings exist.
behaviors.test_description: Feed a multi-item inline findings set through the real aggregation/serialization pipeline and assert payload cardinality and IDs exactly match the source set before summary post call.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real pull request and end-to-end API sequence; real HTTP ordering/auth/rate-limit/validation issues are the target failures. Rejected Integration: mocked provider can hide sequencing and validation failures. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: findings are precomputed (no model dependence).
behaviors.test_description: Run the pipeline against a live test PR using a fixed findings fixture; verify diff read succeeds, all inline posts return success, and summary post succeeds with expected linkage.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is a full agent pipeline combining real model output and downstream posting steps; failures can occur in the handoff from model-generated findings to inline/summary publication. Multiple stages must succeed in sequence with real dependencies. Rejected Agentic: agentic-only tests miss cross-stage orchestration and posting completion criteria in the same live run.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the complete live automation on a real PR with a real model: ingest diff, generate findings, post inline comments, then post summary; assert run completes autonomously and posted artifacts are internally consistent.
